title: 🎮 Version 1.2.0: Game Arcade, Minimize Sidebar & Token Telemetry
message:
DevHunt v1.2.0 is now live! Major updates in this release:

1. Offline Game Arcade: Play classic, developer-themed mini-games like Git Commit Snake, Data Lane Runner, Terminal Decrypt, and Hex Malware Sweeper with premium non-blocking canvas overlays.
2. Minimizable Sidebar: Collapse the left navigation menu into an icon-only strip. Toggled via settings, clicking the top hamburger icon, or pressing the global 'Ctrl+B' hotkey.
3. Dynamic Feature Access Switches: Toggle workspace modules (Music Player, Quest Board, Intel Vault, Doc Forensics, Game Arcade) on or off from the settings panel with smart AI chat fallbacks.
4. Detailed Token Analytics: Direct API telemetry tracks prompt and completion token volumes automatically. View token usage graphs in the dashboard or run 'hunt stats' inside the Hunt Terminal.

title: ⚡ Version 1.1: Launcher Self-Healing & Comprehensive Logging
message:
DevHunt v1.1 is now live! Major updates in this release:

1. Robust Self-Healing Setup: Automated Python 3.10+ path check, virtual environment health checks, and self-repair (auto-deletes and recreates broken venvs).
2. Super-fast Startups: Bypasses pip installation overhead using backend/check_requirements.py to verify satisfied packages locally.
3. Detailed Activity logs: Every chat message, Quest Board change (creation, completion, deletion), and executed terminal command is now captured in SQLite logs.
4. Log Dashboard Filters: Filter logs by updates, todo, terminal, chat, key_event, and system on the DevHunt Logs dashboard.

title: Welcome to the DevHunt Beta!
message: I am happy to share that this journey has started, and we are officially in the Beta version of the app! Stay tuned for updates.
